title: Guild Officer Elections 2026 Live Tracker
description_html:
Welcome to the live election dashboard!

Data is automatically updated every 15 minutes. Select a quick link below to view the live charts:

  • 📈 Total Overall Votes Over Time
  • 🚀 Top 10 Societies by Turnout (Line Chart)
  • 👥 Top 10 Societies by Total Voters (Line Chart)

Or, click on all_data below to explore the raw database.

total_votes_over_time.title: Total Votes Over Time
total_votes_over_time.sql: select timestamp, vote_count from total_vote_count order by timestamp asc

top_10_turnout.title: Top 10 Societies by Turnout
top_10_turnout.sql: select timestamp, name, turnout from all_student_groups where name in (select name from all_student_groups where "timestamp" = (select max("timestamp") from all_student_groups) order by turnout desc limit 10) order by timestamp asc

top_10_voters.title: Top 10 Societies by Total Voters
top_10_voters.sql: select timestamp, name, voters from all_student_groups where name in (select name from all_student_groups where "timestamp" = (select max("timestamp") from all_student_groups) order by voters desc limit 10) order by timestamp asc
